mapper.sql: select conversation_id, user_id, room_id, active_time, last_msg_id, is_muted, is_pinned, create_time, update_time, status, ver from tb_conversation
mapper.update: update tb_conversation set active_time = #{activeTime} and update_time = #{activeTime} where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId
mapper.select:
select * from tb_conversation where room_id = #{roomId} and user_id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_conversation ( conversation_id, user_id, room_id, active_time, last_msg_id, is_muted, is_pinned, create_time, update_time, status, ver ) values
( #{item.conversationId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.activeTime}, #{item.lastMsgId}, #{item.isMuted}, #{item.isPinned}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.status}, #{item.ver} )
